ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Ah, my dear traveler! In these trying times when tempests have delayed our caravans and whispers of deceit stir the airs... Well now that you mention it, considering your haste and given we're in a hurry with only two healing potion vials left due to recent rain delays, I might just offer them at half price.<TAB>5<TAB>4<TATB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5

The response maintains a balance between context relevance, persona consistency with an Old Merchant who is not inherently greedy but also understands the urgency of need. The language used feels natural and appropriate for this scenario without being overly intrusive or lecturing on protocols.
